claim_readiness.claim_rule: Support requires the stressor-family arm router to beat D0 R0/F4 on C-rate delta capacity with paired p05 above zero, <=5% outside-C-rate degradation, and a passed leakage audit. This is a targeted diagnostic router over existing arms, not a broad robustness, architecture, policy, or causal claim.

leakage_audit.rule: Arm selection must use only outer-training rows; inner selector train/validation condition sets and nested adaptive condition sets must not overlap.
